Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Dismissal - No Appearance

Notice Of Application, Application For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Brian S. Healy, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: UMPGUA BANK
John G. Warner, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Andre F. Azarinfar

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff UMPQUA BANK's Application For Writ Of Attachment is granted in the amount of $761,889.25. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. The homestead exemption is granted as to Defendants' residence. The exemption of $6,750 is granted as to the dental equipment. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (EAH/612)
